name: codeforge-test
description: codeforge Integration Test lane plugin (CFP-367 / ADR-055 — 부활). IntegrationTestAgent (Sonnet tier) 1 에이전트: §8.6 계약 이행 + docker-compose.test.yml 동적 실행 + 전체 suite regression + test-verdict-v2 생성. codeforge core 의존. + CFP-307 DocsAgent 잔존 참조 제거 (2026-05-10). + CFP-373 IntegrationTestAgent git add/commit 권한 추가 + blame 3-tier 절차 + test-verdict v2.1→v2.2 story_keys[] + attribution_confidence (2026-05-11). + CFP-379 IntegrationTestAgent·StatefulTestAgent rate-limit→Opus fallback 정책 (ADR-057, 2026-05-11).
